title: lithospermum crypthantiflorum
intro: Lithospermum crypthantiflorum, also known as Chinese forget-me-not, is a plant species in the borage family that has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries. The plant's roots and leaves have been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Lithospermum crypthantiflorum include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce blood pressure, and exhibit immunomodulatory effects. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
